libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Update tests for the 2.0.0-M1 API surface instead of adding setup. The compile failure is caused by removed legacy org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs; do not add pekko-actor-typed_2.13 just to compensate, because it is a separate typed-actor API and does not restore those classes.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests include coverage for APIs that are no longer present in pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1.
If retaining the existing DnsSettings fallback test, keep the already-used java.base/sun.net.dns add-exports configuration; this is not a new library-wide setup requirement.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required for meaningful pekko-actor_2.13 coverage: the 2.0.0-M1 artifact resolves with only scala-library and typesafe config, and normal usage is in-process ActorSystem/classic actor APIs.
